SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-01-2021 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN B. WILLIAMS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT METRO MILE INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TERESA GEORGE VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THEIR MATTER HEARD BY A PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D525)
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
